title: IP23 7EB, 2 Agriculture Growing Limited: permit partial surrender issued - EPR/FP3036WQ/S007
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit, decision document for:    Operator name: 2 Agriculture Growing Limited   Installation name: Collingsford (Thwaite) Farm   Permit number: EPR/FP3036WQ/S007   "
